title: Visualization with D3 backend CoAP
description: Implement live mesh visualization frontend using D3.js with backend data feed via CoAP from gateways. Update 2nnd.2 accordingly.
notes: Implemented D3.js integration in dashboard for topology (force graph), spectrum bars, live packet flow lines, GPS scatter. Uses existing CoAP /topology, /stats from gateways. Updated 2nnd.2 via epic. 1 file change only. Ran pytest. 3 codereview passes completed via bd and linter.
